lessons.name: Sautéing Vegetables
lessons.description: Learn how to sauté vegetables to enhance their flavor and texture.
steps: Prepare the vegetables by washing and cutting them into uniform pieces.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the vegetables and stir frequently until they are tender and slightly browned.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve warm as a side dish or incorporate into other recipes.

lessons.name: Cooking Rice
lessons.description: Master the technique of cooking rice perfectly.
steps: Rinse the rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a pot, combine rice and water in a 1:2 ratio.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
Cook for 18-20 minutes or until water is absorbed.
Fluff with a fork and serve.
